source: Some systems are absolutely critical to the maintenance of our empire's trade networks. A Starbase Administration Office is the seat of a very important official of our Empire, tasked with the protection of local trade routes and the defense of this critical starbase.\n
text: Some systems are absolutely critical to the maintenance of our empire's trade networks. A Starbase Administration Office is the seat of a very important official of our Empire, tasked with the protection of local trade routes and the defense of this critical starbase.__PROT_0000__

source: Central location for all immigration for the system.\n
text: Central location for all immigration for the system.__PROT_0000__

source: Some systems are specialized for the extraction of mineral resources to fuel our economy. A System Mineral Refinery gives a starbase the capacity to increase the efficiency of mineral extraction operations on all planets within the system.\n
text: Some systems are specialized for the extraction of mineral resources to fuel our economy. A System Mineral Refinery gives a starbase the capacity to increase the efficiency of mineral extraction operations on all planets within the system.__PROT_0000__
